evals.prompt: I want to add a forgot password flow.
evals.expected_output: A GitHub issue markdown file specifying the forgot password feature.

assertions.name: Follows New Template
assertions.description: The output contains the exact sections from the new template: Overview, Acceptance Criteria, and Technical Specification (Frontend, Backend, Database, Security).

assertions.name: Details Token Expiration
assertions.description: The security or backend section mentions token expiration for the reset link.

evals.prompt: Let's build a feature to export the analysis results as CSV on the dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A GitHub issue markdown file specifying the CSV export feature.

assertions.name: Follows New Template
assertions.description: The output contains the exact sections from the new template: Overview, Acceptance Criteria, and Technical Specification (Frontend, Backend, Database, Security).

assertions.name: Details Rate Limiting or Performance
assertions.description: The backend or technical section mentions rate limiting or performance considerations for the CSV export.
